kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.en: A new table reservation at {restaurant} is waiting and has not been accepted yet. Please open your Kitchen Order App to accept or reject it.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.it: Una nuova prenotazione al tavolo presso {restaurant} è in attesa e non è ancora stata accettata. Apri la tua Kitchen Order App per accettarla o rifiutarla.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.es: Una nueva reserva de mesa en {restaurant} está esperando y aún no ha sido aceptada. Abre tu Kitchen Order App para aceptarla o rechazarla.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.fr: Une nouvelle réservation de table chez {restaurant} est en attente et n'a pas encore été acceptée. Ouvrez votre Kitchen Order App pour l'accepter ou la refuser.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.de: Eine neue Tischreservierung bei {restaurant} wartet und wurde noch nicht angenommen. Öffnen Sie Ihre Kitchen Order App, um sie anzunehmen oder abzulehnen.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.pt: Uma nova reserva de mesa em {restaurant} está aguardando e ainda não foi aceita. Abra o seu Kitchen Order App para aceitá-la ou recusá-la.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.pt-BR: Uma nova reserva de mesa em {restaurant} está aguardando e ainda não foi aceita. Abra o seu Kitchen Order App para aceitar ou recusar.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.nl: Een nieuwe tafelreservering bij {restaurant} wacht en is nog niet geaccepteerd. Open je Kitchen Order App om deze te accepteren of te weigeren.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.pl: Nowa rezerwacja stolika w {restaurant} czeka i nie została jeszcze zaakceptowana. Otwórz aplikację Kitchen Order App, aby ją zaakceptować lub odrzucić.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.ru: Новое бронирование столика в {restaurant} ожидает и ещё не принято. Откройте приложение Kitchen Order App, чтобы принять или отклонить его.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.sv: En ny bordsbokning på {restaurant} väntar och har ännu inte accepterats. Öppna din Kitchen Order App för att acceptera eller avböja den.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.da: En ny bordreservation hos {restaurant} venter og er endnu ikke accepteret. Åbn din Kitchen Order App for at acceptere eller afvise den.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.nb: En ny bordreservasjon hos {restaurant} venter og er ennå ikke akseptert. Åpne Kitchen Order App for å akseptere eller avvise den.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.fi: Uusi pöytävaraus ravintolassa {restaurant} odottaa eikä sitä ole vielä hyväksytty. Avaa Kitchen Order App hyväksyäksesi tai hylätäksesi sen.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.el: Μια νέα κράτηση τραπεζιού στο {restaurant} περιμένει και δεν έχει γίνει ακόμη αποδεκτή. Ανοίξτε την εφαρμογή Kitchen Order App για να την αποδεχτείτε ή να την απορρίψετε.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.ro: O nouă rezervare de masă la {restaurant} așteaptă și nu a fost încă acceptată. Deschideți aplicația Kitchen Order App pentru a o accepta sau a o refuza.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.ja: {restaurant} の新しいテーブル予約が承認待ちです。Kitchen Order App を開いて承認または拒否してください。
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.ko: {restaurant}의 새로운 테이블 예약이 대기 중이며 아직 수락되지 않았습니다. Kitchen Order App을 열어 수락하거나 거절하세요.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.zh: {restaurant} 有一个新的餐桌预订正在等待，尚未被接受。请打开您的 Kitchen Order App 来接受或拒绝它。
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.ca: Una nova reserva de taula a {restaurant} està esperant i encara no s'ha acceptat. Obre la teva Kitchen Order App per acceptar-la o rebutjar-la.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.tr: {restaurant} için yeni bir masa rezervasyonu bekliyor ve henüz kabul edilmedi. Kabul etmek veya reddetmek için Kitchen Order App uygulamanızı açın.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.uk: Нове бронювання столика в {restaurant} очікує та ще не прийняте. Відкрийте додаток Kitchen Order App, щоб прийняти або відхилити його.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.ar: حجز طاولة جديد في {restaurant} في الانتظار ولم يتم قبوله بعد. افتح تطبيق Kitchen Order App لقبوله أو رفضه.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.he: הזמנת שולחן חדשה ב-{restaurant} ממתינה ועדיין לא אושרה. פתח את אפליקציית Kitchen Order App כדי לאשר או לדחות אותה.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.id: Reservasi meja baru di {restaurant} sedang menunggu dan belum diterima. Buka Kitchen Order App Anda untuk menerima atau menolaknya.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.vi: Một đặt bàn mới tại {restaurant} đang chờ và chưa được chấp nhận. Mở Kitchen Order App của bạn để chấp nhận hoặc từ chối.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.th: การจองโต๊ะใหม่ที่ {restaurant} กำลังรอและยังไม่ได้รับการยอมรับ เปิด Kitchen Order App ของคุณเพื่อยอมรับหรือปฏิเสธ
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.hi: {restaurant} पर एक नया टेबल आरक्षण प्रतीक्षा कर रहा है और अभी तक स्वीकार नहीं किया गया है। इसे स्वीकार या अस्वीकार करने के लिए अपना Kitchen Order App खोलें।
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.cs: Nová rezervace stolu v {restaurant} čeká a dosud nebyla přijata. Otevřete aplikaci Kitchen Order App a přijměte ji nebo odmítněte.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.sk: Nová rezervácia stola v {restaurant} čaká a ešte nebola prijatá. Otvorte aplikáciu Kitchen Order App a prijmite ju alebo odmietnite.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.hu: Egy új asztalfoglalás a(z) {restaurant} étteremben várakozik, és még nem fogadták el. Nyisd meg a Kitchen Order App alkalmazást az elfogadásához vagy elutasításához.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.bg: Нова резервация за маса в {restaurant} чака и все още не е приета. Отворете своето приложение Kitchen Order App, за да я приемете или отхвърлите.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.hr: Nova rezervacija stola u {restaurant} čeka i još nije prihvaćena. Otvorite svoju Kitchen Order App da je prihvatite ili odbijete.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.sr: Нова резервација стола у {restaurant} чека и још увек није прихваћена. Отворите своју Kitchen Order App да бисте је прихватили или одбили.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.sl: Nova rezervacija mize v {restaurant} čaka in še ni bila sprejeta. Odprite svojo aplikacijo Kitchen Order App, da jo sprejmete ali zavrnete.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.et: Uus lauabroneering restoranis {restaurant} ootab ja pole veel kinnitatud. Ava oma Kitchen Order App, et see kinnitada või tagasi lükata.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.lt: Naujas staliuko rezervavimas {restaurant} laukia ir dar nepatvirtintas. Atidarykite savo Kitchen Order App, kad jį priimtumėte arba atmestumėte.
kitchen.autoCallReservationMessage.lv: Jauna galdiņa rezervācija {restaurant} gaida un vēl nav apstiprināta. Atveriet savu Kitchen Order App, lai to apstiprinātu vai noraidītu.
